title: 'Don't Normalise Sexual Harassment, Coercion': NCW Summons 2 Comedians Over Violation of 'Dignity of Women' During Show
description: The NCW expressed deep concern over the normalization of behaviour that undermines women’s consent, dignity, and autonomy. The Commission stated that portraying sexual coercion or disrespect towards women as entertainment is unacceptable and contrary to constitutional principles of equality & safety
